diagnostics.summary: Interactive UX surfaces such as the status line and watch mode are unavailable for runner=codex mode=headless.

renderedFlow:
[prompt-language] Flow: produce a bounded CRM core slice through a sequential prompt-language run optimized for factory-quality evidence rather than raw throughput | Status: active

> prompt: Work only inside the current workspace root. Treat `.factory/` as frozen control input and do not edit it.  <-- current
  prompt: Write docs/prd.md, docs/acceptance-criteria.md, docs/personas.md, docs/use-cases.md, and docs/non-functional-requirements.md for a bounded CRM core covering contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the scope small, deterministic, and implementation-ready.
  prompt: Write docs/architecture/context.md, docs/architecture/container.md, docs/architecture/domain-model.md, docs/architecture/sequence-contact-to-opportunity.md, docs/api-contracts.md, docs/data-model.md, docs/adr-001-stack.md, specs/domain-glossary.md, and specs/invariants.md for the same bounded CRM core. Favor pure TypeScript domain logic and in-memory application services.
  prompt: Build packages/domain/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/domain/test for contacts, companies, opportunities, stage transitions, tasks, notes, and dashboard summaries. Keep the module deterministic and dependency-free.
  prompt: Build packages/api/src/index.ts plus focused tests under packages/api/test for in-memory application services that create contacts, create opportunities, move stages, add tasks and notes, and compute dashboard summaries. Depend only on the local domain package.
  prompt: Write qa-flows/crm-smoke.json and demo/crm.demo.yaml as deterministic QA and demo specifications for the implemented CRM core. Ground them in the actual workspace state.
  prompt: Write README.md, docs/traceability.md, docs/test-strategy.md, docs/verification-summary.md, docs/product-summary.md, docs/demo-script.md, docs/release-notes.md, docs/known-issues.md, docs/handover.md, and CHANGELOG.md from the implemented workspace. Then run the local verification commands and fix the workspace until build-if-present, noslop doctor, noslop check --tier=fast, npm run lint, npm run typecheck, and npm run test all pass.
  run: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(!pkg.scripts?.build){console.log('No build script declared; skipping build verification.'); process.exit(0)} const result=spawnSync('npm',['run','build'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
  run: noslop doctor
  run: noslop check --tier=fast
  run: npm run lint
  run: npm run typecheck
  run: npm run test

done when:
  build_if_present  [pending]
  noslop_doctor  [pending]
  noslop_fast  [pending]
  lint  [pending]
  typecheck  [pending]
  tests  [pending]

  file_exists docs/adr-001-stack.md  [pending]

  file_exists packages/domain/src/index.ts  [pending]
  file_exists packages/domain/test  [pending]

  file_exists packages/api/test  [pending]
